title: Gymnastics Practice 体操训练
scene: Coach在指导Nina做体操基础动作训练。

lines.en: Coach, I want to practice my cartwheel today.
lines.zh: 教练，我今天想练习侧翻。

lines.en: Good! First, let us do a warm-up.
lines.zh: 好的！首先，我们做一下热身。

lines.en: Should I stretch my arms and legs?
Yes. Raise your arms and reach for the sky.
lines.zh: 对。举起手臂，向天空伸展。

lines.en: Done. Now can I try the cartwheel?
lines.zh: 好了。现在可以试侧翻了吗？

lines.en: Put your hands on the mat and kick your legs over.
lines.zh: 把双手放在垫子上，把腿翻过去。

lines.en: I am afraid I will fall.
I will stand right next to you. Go ahead.
OK, here I go! Did I do it right?
lines.zh: 好的，我来了！我做对了吗？

lines.en: Perfect! Your legs were straight. Try one more.
lines.zh: 完美！你的腿很直。再来一次。

lines.en: I feel so proud. Gymnastics is fun!
lines.zh: 我感到很骄傲。体操真有趣！
